features: Hair Scrunchies for Women from Day to Night: Soft Hair ties prevent pulling, breakage, and frizz for smooth, healthy, and tangle-free hair day and night
Softer Than Silk Scrunchies: Smooth satin glides gently through hair, to prevent frizz, breakage, & marks. Soft, breathable, & gentle for day or night use
Satin Scrunchies for All Hair Types: Stretchy scrunchies for girls hold thick, curly, or fine hair securely without slipping, pulling, or tightness
Versatile Silk Hair Scrunchies: Hold hair securely and can be worn on the wrist as a stylish accessory, perfect for work, school, sports, or parties
Satin Hair Scrunchies Gift for Her: Stylish and practical hair bobbles for women loved by all ages, combining comfort and elegance for any occasion
description: From the brand Previous page You’re Not Meant to Blend In. Uniwr was created to challenge imitation, judgment, and impossible standards. We believe style should be authentic, not performative, and that every accessory should help you express your true self. Our mission is simple: to give individuality back to the wearer. Whether bold or understated, Uniwr is the thread that helps you stand out — because you’re not meant to blend in. Uniwr 8 Hair Claw Clips How we get our start? Uniwr was founded in 2024 to give people accessories that go beyond trends. We wanted to create products that make everyday styling easier while letting individuality shine. What makes our products unique? Every piece is designed with purpose, combining modern style, practical function, and the spirit of self-expression. Our products aren’t just accessories; they’re tools to help you stand out. Are our products high quality? Yes. We focus on durable materials, careful design, and comfort you can feel. Each Uniwr product is crafted to last and stay reliable through daily use. Next page
